top_signals.title: AI Chip Startup SambaNova Raises Funds at $11 Billion Value
top_signals.summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 3 Ways AI Powers Service Desk Attacks and How to Prevent Them
top_signals.summary: Specops Software explains how AI is making service desk impersonation attacks more convincing, personalized, and scalable, along with practical steps organizations can take to strengthen onboarding and identity verification. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mobile app Toss and blockchain Optimism to conduct Korean won stablecoin POC: report
top_signals.summary: Toss has reportedly partnered with Optimism and Sunnyside Labs for a proof of concept on the feasibility of a Korean won-based stablecoin for payments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Waymo starts driverless rides in four more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
top_signals.summary: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

top_signals.title: Ripple becomes Kansas Jayhawks sports sponsor with XRP patch to appear on jerseys
top_signals.summary: Besides the sports partnership, Ripple has committed to fund financial and technology education programs for student-athletes.
